title: Cambessedesia bidentata

It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments. In herbal medicine, Cambessedesia bidentata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in the production of herbal extracts and capsules.
